action.agent.description: Run an AI agent with provider selection, tools, memory, and structured output.
action.agent.name: Agent

properties.label: Provider
properties.name: provider
properties.placeholder: Type or select an AI provider

properties.label: Model
properties.name: model
properties.placeholder: Type or select a model ID

properties.description: Prompt messages with role and content.
properties.label: Messages
properties.name: messages

properties.description: Tools the agent can use. Select from built-in nodes or integration tools.
properties.label: Tools
properties.name: tools

properties.description: Maximum number of agentic loop iterations.
properties.label: Max Iterations
properties.name: maxIterations

properties.description: Hard cap on total time the agent loop may run. Runtime clamped to 3600.
properties.label: Max Wall-Clock (seconds)
properties.name: maxSeconds

properties.description: Cumulative input tokens across iterations. Runtime clamped to 5,000,000.
properties.label: Max Input Tokens
properties.name: maxInputTokens

properties.description: Hard cap on LLM spend per loop fire. Runtime clamped to $50.
properties.label: Max Cost (USD)
properties.name: maxCostUsd

properties.description: JSONata expression evaluated against the agent's final response. Empty means the first final response always succeeds.
properties.label: Success Condition (JSONata)
properties.name: successWhen

properties.description: If set, the agent must iterate at least this many times even when the success condition matches earlier.
properties.label: Min Iterations Before Exit
properties.name: minIterations

properties.description: How many times to re-fire the loop on failure before falling through to silent.
properties.label: Retry Count
properties.name: retryCount

properties.description: Unique key scoping this memory. Use interpolation to make it per-user.
properties.label: Memory Key
properties.name: memoryKey

properties.description: How long to keep memory in Redis. Default 86400 = 24 hours.
properties.label: Memory TTL (seconds)
properties.name: memoryTTL

properties.description: Optional JSON Schema or provider response-format object.
properties.label: Response Format
properties.name: responseFormat

properties.description: For o1/o3 (OpenAI) and extended thinking (Anthropic).
properties.label: Reasoning Effort
properties.name: reasoningEffort

properties.description: Stream LLM tokens in real-time via WebSocket.
properties.label: Stream Response
properties.name: streaming

properties.description: Markdown skill files the agent can load on demand.

properties.description: Number of times to retry this node on failure (0 = no retries).
properties.label: Retries
properties.name: retries

properties.description: Milliseconds to wait between retries.
properties.label: Retry Delay (ms)

action.gslides.description: Create, edit, and export Google Slides — slide layouts, text edits, find/replace, images, tables, shapes, speaker notes, backgrounds, sharing, and exports.
action.gslides.name: Google Slides

properties.label: Title-slide subtitle
properties.name: initial_content
properties.placeholder: Optional — text inserted into the title slide's subtitle.

properties.description: Bind an Agent/LLM node output OR paste a JSON array directly. Per-slide keys: `layout` (BLANK / TITLE / TITLE_AND_BODY / SECTION_HEADER / TITLE_AND_TWO_COLUMNS / TITLE_ONLY / BIG_NUMBER / CAPTION_ONLY), `title`, `subtitle` (TITLE layout), `body`, `notes`, `image_url`, `background_color`.
properties.label: Outline
properties.name: outline
properties.placeholder:
{{ $node.Agent.output }}     ← bind an LLM output
OR paste a JSON array:
[
  {"layout": "TITLE", "title": "Q1 review", "subtitle": "March 2026"},
  {"layout": "TITLE_AND_BODY", "title": "Highlights",
   "body": "Revenue up 30%\n• 500 new customers\n• 3 launches",
   "notes": "Emphasise enterprise tier"},
  {"layout": "TITLE_AND_BODY", "title": "Roadmap",
   "body": "Q2 plans…",
   "image_url": "https://…/chart.png",
   "background_color": "#f4f4f4"}
]

properties.label: New title
properties.name: new_title
properties.placeholder: Leave blank to keep Google's default "Copy of …".

properties.description: Object ID of the slide. Run `Get All Text` first to discover IDs.

properties.name: slide_id

properties.label: Element ID
properties.name: element_id

properties.description: Position in the slide list.
properties.label: Index (0-based)
properties.name: slide_index

properties.description: Hex `#rrggbb`. Leave blank to use the image instead.
properties.label: Background colour
properties.name: background_color

properties.description: Optional. Leave blank to format every run on the element.
properties.label: Range start (chars)
properties.name: start_index

properties.description: Optional. Required if you set a start.
properties.label: Range end (chars)
properties.name: end_index

trigger.gmail.description: Fires once per new Gmail message matching your query. Uses Gmail's `historyId` cursor so each poll only surfaces what arrived since the last run — no duplicates, no missed mail.
trigger.gmail.name: Gmail

properties.description: Trigger only fires on messages matching these filters. Use “Edit raw query” for full Gmail search syntax (OR, parens, etc).
properties.label: Gmail Search Query
properties.name: query

properties.description: Hard cap on how many messages a single poll emits. Protects against backlog spikes after downtime.
properties.label: Max messages per poll
properties.name: max_messages_per_poll

properties.description: How often the background scheduler asks Gmail for new messages. Minimum 30s to stay inside Google's quota.
properties.label: Poll interval (seconds)
properties.name: poll_interval_seconds

properties.description: Number of times to retry this node on failure (0 = no retries).
properties.label: Retries
properties.name: retries

properties.description: Milliseconds to wait between retries.
properties.label: Retry Delay (ms)
properties.name: retry_delay_ms

trigger.google_sheets.description: Fires when rows are added or updated in the picked sheet. Pick the event below — `Row added` watches the bottom of the sheet, `Row updated` hashes each row so in-place edits emit.
trigger.google_sheets.name: Google Sheets

properties.description: Column letter to read up to. Z covers 26 columns.
properties.label: Last column
properties.name: last_column

properties.description: Number of times to retry this node on failure (0 = no retries).
properties.label: Retries
properties.name: retries

properties.description: Milliseconds to wait between retries.
properties.label: Retry Delay (ms)
properties.name: retry_delay_ms

trigger.gpeople_change.description: Fires when contacts are added to or updated in your Google Contacts. First poll snapshots silently; later polls emit one execution per matching contact.
trigger.gpeople_change.name: Google Contacts

properties.description: Min 30s, max 3600s.
properties.label: Poll interval (seconds)
properties.name: poll_interval_seconds

properties.description: Number of times to retry this node on failure (0 = no retries).
properties.label: Retries

properties.label: Retry Delay (ms)

trigger.gtasks_change.description: Fires when tasks are added to or completed inside the picked tasklist. First poll snapshots silently; later polls emit one execution per matching task.
trigger.gtasks_change.name: Google Tasks

properties.description: Number of times to retry this node on failure (0 = no retries).
properties.label: Retries
properties.name: retries

properties.description: Milliseconds to wait between retries.
properties.label: Retry Delay (ms)
properties.name: retry_delay_ms

trigger.gyt_change.description: Fires on new comments, new subscribers, new uploads, search matches, or replies to your comments. First poll snapshots silently; later polls emit one execution per new item. Quota-aware — `new_video` for other channels uses YouTube's RSS feed (zero quota).
trigger.gyt_change.name: YouTube

options.label: New comment on my channel / video
New video uploaded (own or watched channel)

properties.description: Leave blank to watch every comment thread on your channel.
properties.label: Video (optional)
properties.name: video_id

properties.description: Paste the channel's `UC…` id (not the @handle).
properties.label: Channel ID
properties.name: watched_channel_id

properties.description: Each poll costs 100 quota units — keep the interval above 5 minutes.
properties.label: Search query
properties.name: search_query

properties.description: Min 30s. Bump to 300+ for `new_video_search_match`.

trigger.meta.lead.description: Fires when a user submits a Facebook/Instagram Lead Ad form for the connected Page. The webhook payload only carries the leadgen_id — pair with the Lead Ads action node (fetch) to pull the full form data.
